zh.lifeSummary: Juliana Asshewy是Sir Stephen de Asshewy和Lady Margaret Ifeld的女兒，於大約1304年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可。她於1317年之前與Richard Le Lacer Baron Lane of Hampton在英國素福爾可亞可利結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1360年在英國英格蘭艾可享年57歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Juliana Asshewy是Sir Stephen de Asshewy和Lady Margaret Ifeld的女儿，于大约1304年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可。她于1317年之前与Richard Le Lacer Baron Lane of Hampton在英国素福爾可亞可利结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1360年在英国英格兰艾可享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: Juliana
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of Julianus ( see Julian ), which was revived in England in the 18th century and has been used occasionally ever since.

en.lifeSummary: Juliana Asshewy was born about 1304, in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of Sir Stephen de Asshewy and Lady Margaret Ifeld. She married Richard Le Lacer Baron Lane of Hampton before 1317, in Yaxley, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1360, in Essex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Juliana Asshewy est née environ 1304, à Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fille de Sir Stephen de Asshewy et Lady Margaret Ifeld. Elle a épousé Richard Le Lacer Baron Lane of Hampton avant 1317, à Yaxley, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1360, à Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Juliana Asshewy wurde um 1304 in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, als Tochter von Sir Stephen de Asshewy und Lady Margaret Ifeld geboren. Sie hat vor 1317 in Yaxley, Suffolk, England Richard Le Lacer Baron Lane of Hampton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1360 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Essex, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Juliana Asshewy è nata il circa 1304 nel Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlia di Sir Stephen de Asshewy e Lady Margaret Ifeld. Lei sposato Richard Le Lacer Baron Lane of Hampton prima del 1317, nel Yaxley, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1360, nel Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Juliana Asshewyは約1304年にイギリスイギリススフォルクでSir Stephen de AsshewyとLady Margaret Ifeldの娘として生まれた。1317年以前にイギリススフォルクヤクスリーでRichard Le Lacer Baron Lane of Hamptonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1360年にイギリスイギリスエセックスで57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Juliana Asshewy(은)는 대략 1304년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크에서 Sir Stephen de Asshewy(와)과 Lady Margaret Ifeld의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1317년 이전 영국 수폴크 야스리에서 Richard Le Lacer Baron Lane of Hampton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1360년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Juliana Asshewy nasceu aproximadamente 1304, em Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filha de Sir Stephen de Asshewy e Lady Margaret Ifeld. Ela casou-se com Richard Le Lacer Baron Lane of Hampton antes 1317, em Yaxley, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1360, em Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Juliana Asshewy родилась около 1304 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. Её родителей звали Sir Stephen de Asshewy и Lady Margaret Ifeld. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Le Lacer Baron Lane of Hampton перед 1317 г. в местности яксли, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1360 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 57 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Juliana Asshewy nació aproximadamente 1304, en Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hija de Sir Stephen de Asshewy y Lady Margaret Ifeld. Se casó con Richard Le Lacer Baron Lane of Hampton antes de 1317, en Yaxley, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1360, en Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 57 años.
